response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video and divided it into segments based on when the performer speaks versus when she plays the rhythm game. 2. Identified two songs being played: 'WASSHOI ~Ore-tachi no Kangaeru Saikyou no Matsuri Song~' and 'Rin to Shite Saku Hana no Gotoku'. 3. Used the search tool to verify song titles and identify the original artists/composers. 4. Found complete lyrics for both songs. 5. Mapped the segments, descriptions, song metadata, and lyrics into the requested JSON format.
response.global_summary: The video features VTuber Shiranui Flare playing the rhythm game 'pop'n music'. She introduces and plays two songs: 'WASSHOI ~Ore-tachi no Kangaeru Saikyou no Matsuri Song~' and 'Rin to Shite Saku Hana no Gotoku'. She speaks between the songs and at the end of the video.

scenes.description: The performer introduces herself and the first song she will be playing. No vocal music is playing.
The performer plays 'WASSHOI ~Ore-tachi no Kangaeru Saikyou no Matsuri Song~' in the rhythm game 'pop'n music'. Text 'MZD' appears in the background.
scenes.song_title: WASSHOI ~Ore-tachi no Kangaeru Saikyou no Matsuri Song~

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
(┘ ﾟ ∀ ﾟ) ┘ WASSHOI! (┘ ﾟ ∀ ﾟ) ┘ WASSHOI!! (┘ ﾟ ∀ ﾟ) ┘ WASSHOI!!!
Three party people decided to make a song together, and this is how it turned out.

I can hear the city's throbbing heartbeat,
Linking with the red paper lanterns (the light).
It illuminates your profile right next to me,
Ah, Yoisa, hara-hore-hire-hare.

Karakoro, karakoro, if the rabbit dances,
The geta clogs will hop right along to the rhythm too.
Are fairy tales surprising too?
Is that so? Lol.

Light the sparkler,
And the excited soul jumps right into the sound.
The night wind blows,
The moon laughs,
And the excitement begins.

WASSHOI! WASSHOI!! WASSHOI!!!
It's a festival!
WASSHOI! WASSHOI!! WASSHOI!!!
Turn it up!
WASSHOI! WASSHOI!! WASSHOI!!!
If you get lonely,
Just hop onto my portable shrine (mikoshi).
WASSHOI! WASSHOI!! WASSHOI!!!
If you don't dance, you're missing out!
WASSHOI! WASSHOI!! WASSHOI!!!
Omotenashi (Hospitality).
WASSHOI! WASSHOI!! WASSHOI!!!
If you're having fun,
Let's start our two-person festival!

Come on over, come take a look,
I'll never miss my target.
The vendor guy gives a bitter smile,
Steal a heart for a grand ovation.
Fu, ha, gyu, and kiss.
Thinking about it in my head,
The delusions just won't stop.
Che, che, che, che-che, che-kera.

Even the stubborn, nagging old man,
Is a mirror ball today for a special occasion.
Licking some cotton candy,
Climbing up the tower,
Starting to rotate.

WASSHOI! WASSHOI!! WASSHOI!!!
The night is just beginning.
WASSHOI! WASSHOI!! WASSHOI!!!
Make it roar!
WASSHOI! WASSHOI!! WASSHOI!!!
It's not just you,
My portable shrine is in perfect condition ↑↑
WASSHOI! WASSHOI!! WASSHOI!!!
If you don't sing, you're missing out!
WASSHOI! WASSHOI!! WASSHOI!!!
Carnival!
WASSHOI! WASSHOI!! WASSHOI!!!
The festival for the two of us
That we dreamed of will never end.

Lost in the crowd,
I was holding your right hand.
I could never say it,
But I'll say that one phrase now.
It happened.

WASSHOI! WASSHOI!! WASSHOI!!!
It's a festival!
WASSHOI! WASSHOI!! WASSHOI!!!
Turn it up!
WASSHOI! WASSHOI!! WASSHOI!!!
If you're having fun,
Let's start our two-person festival!
WASSHOI! WASSHOI!! WASSHOI!!!
If you don't make some noise, you're missing out!
WASSHOI! WASSHOI!! WASSHOI!!!
Ina Bauer!
WASSHOI! WASSHOI!! WASSHOI!!!
Until the night turns to day,
The festival for the two of us will never end.

WASSHOI! WASSHOI!! WASSHOI!!!
WASSHOI! WASSHOI!! WASSHOI!!!
WASSHOI! WASSHOI!! WASSHOI!!!

Well then, everyone,
The party is at its peak.

scenes.description: The performer speaks to her audience and sets up the second song.
The performer plays 'Rin to Shite Saku Hana no Gotoku' in the rhythm game 'pop'n music'.
scenes.song_title: Rin to Shite Saku Hana no Gotoku
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
春深く夢の輪郭を
ぼかして 行き過ぎて 舞い戻る
花びらは仕草を追いかけ
薄明かりの下で 密やか

つまさきであやす月の兎は踊り
星の間を飛びまわる
口笛吹き 飛沫 あがる
わたし 駆ける 追いかける星は

さいて さいて 月にお願い
おだやかな影に薄化粧
しらずしらず えいや!と投げた
つぼみは 行方知れず のまま

見下ろして小さくなった雲の間に
芽を出した線香花火
つぶらな夢 飛沫 あがる
火花 翔る

問いかけた星は かわるがわる
顔を変えた 舞姫の如く
たまゆらに 思い思いに動く影と
背中を合わせて (ああ) 走る!

弧を描き 影は延びる
陽炎の先に さいた あった!
まあるい花が
星の破片が 月の裏側で泣いていた
気づかぬうちに 隠れていた兎も
また弧描く

さいて さいて 月にお願い
おだやかな影に薄化粧
しらずしらず えいや!と投げた
つぼみは 行方知れず

さいて さいた 風に揺られて
おだやかな坂は 薄化粧
下駄鳴らして口笛合わせ
凛として はんなりの こころ
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Spring deepens, blurring the outlines of a dream,
Passing by, dancing back.
Petals chase the gestures,
Secretly under the dim light.

The moon rabbit, coaxed by tiptoes, dances,
Flipping and spinning between the stars.
Whistling, water splashes rise,
I run, chasing after the stars.

Blooming, blooming, I pray to the moon,
Putting light makeup on the calm shadow.
Without realizing it, I threw it away with an 'Ei-ya!',
The bud remains lost, not knowing where it went.

Looking down, between the small clouds,
a sparkler bud sprouted.
A round dream, splashes rise,
Fire sparks soar.

The stars I asked changed one after another,
Like a dancing princess, momentarily.
Back to back with the moving shadows I had in mind (Ah),
Running!

Drawing an arc, the shadow extends,
Beyond the heat haze, it bloomed.
There it was! A round flower,
Star fragments were crying on the far side of the moon.
Without noticing, the rabbit hiding there,
Also drew an arc again.

Blooming, blooming, I pray to the moon,
Putting light makeup on the calm shadow.
Without realizing it, I threw it away with an 'Ei-ya!',
The bud remains lost, not knowing where it went.

Blooming, blooming, swayed by the wind,
The calm slope has light makeup.
Clattering geta clogs, matching the whistle,
'Rin' (dignified), a 'hannari' (elegant) heart.

scenes.description: The performer concludes the video, talking to the viewers.
